---
title: "HindiBabyNet Preregistered Statistical Report"
params:
  reporting_bundle: "results/r_tables/reporting_bundle.rds"
format:
  pdf: default
  html: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
bundle_path <- params$reporting_bundle
reporting_bundle <- readRDS(bundle_path)

render_image <- function(path) {
  if (is.na(path) || !file.exists(path)) {
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  cat(sprintf("![](%s)\n\n", normalizePath(path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)))
}
```

# Dataset Summary

```{r}
knitr::kable(reporting_bundle$dataset_summary)
```

# Model Selection Rationale

```{r}
knitr::kable(reporting_bundle$selection_table)
```

# Diagnostics

```{r}
knitr::kable(reporting_bundle$diagnostics_table)
```

# Fixed Effects

```{r}
knitr::kable(reporting_bundle$fixed_effects)
```

# Research Questions

```{r}
knitr::kable(reporting_bundle$question_summary)
```

# Evidence Summary

```{r}
knitr::kable(reporting_bundle$evidence_table)
```

# Figures

```{r, results='asis'}
apply(reporting_bundle$prediction_manifest, 1, function(row) {
  cat(sprintf("## %s\n\n", row[["response"]]))
  render_image(row[["plot_path"]])
})
```
